uiVsBackend: Manager sees owner-member edit/deactivate/delete controls in UI, but backend blocks actions.
potentialSecurityIssues: Worker role can view ranch billing/access metadata in Settings (policy decision needed).
Worker role can view Herd/Land data read-only (policy decision needed).
